text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the tryouts has arrived. Excitement fills the stadium as
gaggles of trainers swarm in to get a glimpse of the students.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! Everyone, bear witness to how a first-rate racer runs!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: It looks like you're in a good mood today, King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Indeeeed I am! I'm feeling fully recharged and confident in my
preparations!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
By the end of today, every trainer will be fighting over me, for I plan
to make a bold statement in all 12 races!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whaaat? You're going to run in all 12 races?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Why, of course. The more races I participate in, the higher my
chances of getting scouted become!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, wait a second... I thought you get disqualified if you sign up for
more than one race.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: N-no one told me that!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Well, she certainly has made an impression already.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Given her mother's background as a legendary first-rate racer, she
certainly has a lot to live up to. Let's see if she inherited those skills!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the tryouts begin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bang!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The 1600-meter turf race has officially kicked off! What kind of
performance will we see today from our contestants?

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The race is off to a bit of a slower start. The front is starting to bunch
up!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
King Halo has made her way to the middle of the pack! But she's in a
tough spot—the path forward is blocked!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Tch... You all have some real guts getting in my way!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. Looks like King Halo keeps trying to advance, but she can't
find a good position.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
She's always going on about first-rate this, first-rate that, but it
doesn't look like she has the substance to back up her words.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
If anything, it seems like her pride and desperation are bringing her
down.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Is there something wrong with King Halo? She still hasn't made her
move yet! The leaders have already broken off into a sprint!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Wait, what?! They're going already?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Aghhh! What a waste of time going at this pace!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
King Halo has finally kicked into high gear! What a spectacular
display of power! The gap is rapidly closing!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Of course... It's because I'm the kiiing!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
Dang, she's so fast! She caught up to the front in no time! Maybe she
really does have the skills!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The last spurt of the race is a demonstration of true power.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the leading runner being a whole furlong ahead, King Halo's
intimidating determination sends a strong message across the track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her technique, albeit a bit rough around the edges, shows the
potential to stand face-to-face with top-notch racers.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
But it's too little, too late! The leading runner is across the line! King
Halo finishes in second place!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Ugh.
choice_data_list: That was an amazing last spurt!
That was an amazing last spurt!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Of course. Who do you think I am? But such results aren't befitting of
me. How could I possibly finish second...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hang on. You're the trainer from earlier, aren't you? Did you come to
scout me?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it looks like the first wave of recruiters has already arrived!
Very well, I'll give you the honor of marketing yourself to me!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I'm all ears—tell me about yourself. What kind of trainer are you?
choice_data_list: I want to help you win the big races!
I want to help you win the big races!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I don't care to know what you'd do for me, I want to know who you are as a person.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But given how little substance your answer contains, I'm going to have
to pass.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm only looking for first-rate trainers. I won't settle for anyone less.
Right now, you just don't have the qualities I require.
choice_data_list:
I might be a new trainer now, but I'm going to
become first-rate one day!

I might be a new trainer now, but I'm going to
become first-rate one day!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: One day? And when is that exactly?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
For you trainers, you can keep cycling through different racers until
one of them gives you the results to call yourself "first-rate".

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But it's different for us. The actual racers. We only have one chance
to prove ourselves on the track.

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Hey, King! Sorry to interrupt, but your phone is ringing...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ah, is that so? Thanks for letting me know. I'll be right there.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Anyway, I'm going to take my leave now. Goodbye.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Looks like you just got dumped. Don't let it get you down though!
That princess is only going to make it to G3 or G2 races at best.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
Yup, she's just a small fish in the pond who's in for a rude awakening.
The only thing she's got going for her is her pride. It's better to not
waste time on her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The trainers around me try to cheer me up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I can't get King Halo's words about the qualities of a first-rate
trainer out of my mind.
